name: known
description: Persistent memory graph for LLMs. Store facts in one session, recall them in the next. Semantic search, graph relationships, and hierarchical scopes.

hooks.command: command -v known >/dev/null && { known scope tree 2>/dev/null; known session start 2>/dev/null; } || true
command -v known >/dev/null && known session end 2>/dev/null || true
